name: management-as-code-documents-api
description: OpenAPI mock/prototype server for the Management as Code documents API.

scripts.build: node -c index.js && node -c controllers/Health.js && node -c controllers/ProjectDocuments.js && node -c service/HealthService.js && node -c service/ProjectDocumentsService.js && node -c lib/apiError.js && node -c lib/database.js && node -c lib/documentsRepository.js && node -c lib/documentsService.js && node -c lib/paths.js && node -c lib/response.js && node -c lib/validators.js
